$comment: Starter world-model mechanism library. Seeded as 'candidate' status with weak-to-moderate Beta priors; calibrate.py recomputes posteriors from mechanism_observations as the desk learns. Loaded idempotently by seed_bootstrap.py (skip if id exists).

mechanisms.name: Hot jobs print -> higher-for-longer rates -> long-duration/high-multiple tech sells off
mechanisms.notes: Seed worked example: Fri 2026-06-05 strong nonfarm payrolls -> rates higher-for-longer -> violent selloff in chips/AI/mega-cap tech (NVDA, AVGO, TSLA); Nasdaq worst day in over a year. Compounds with mech_oil_inflation_rates when oil/inflation is already elevated.

mechanisms.name: Energy supply shock -> inflation persistence -> fewer cuts -> rate-sensitive equities underperform
mechanisms.notes: e.g. Iran/Strait-of-Hormuz oil conflict keeps headline inflation elevated, reinforcing higher-for-longer; amplifies mech_jobs_duration_tech.

mechanisms.name: Credit spreads widening -> funding stress -> broad equity de-risk
mechanisms.notes: Credit is the regime classifier's veto signal; widening HY spreads (BAMLH0A0HYM2) lead broad drawdowns.

mechanisms.name: Inflation downside surprise -> rate-cut hopes -> long-duration growth outperforms
mechanisms.notes: Mirror image of mech_jobs_duration_tech; soft CPI/PPI prints rally rate-sensitive growth.

mechanisms.name: Earnings beat with guidance raise -> upward estimate revisions -> single-name drift up
mechanisms.notes: Post-earnings-announcement drift; strongest when the raise is a surprise and the regime is supportive.

mechanisms.name: Upstream capacity constraint -> pricing power -> incumbent beneficiary outperforms
mechanisms.notes: Matches the validation_corpus winner exemplar (midstream capacity). Slow diffusion of a constraint into pricing power.

mechanisms.name: VIX term-structure inversion -> hedging demand/deleveraging -> broad drawdown
mechanisms.notes: VIX > VIX3M (backwardation) signals near-term stress; vol-target funds deleverage into weakness.
